project_name: Tha Dabba - The Greatest Tiffin Website on Earth

brand_identity.core_philosophy: Fusion over Imitation. Dark Mode Luxury. 8K Textures.
brand_identity.emotional_archetype: The Royal Feast (Jewel & Luxury + Organic & Earthy)

headings.usage: Hero titles, Section headers, Menu categories

usage_rules.background: Use Charcoal (#121212) as the main background. NEVER use pure black (#000000) except for deep contrast layers.
usage_rules.accents: Use Deep Saffron (#FF9933) for Primary CTAs. Use Brushed Gold (#D4AF37) for borders, icons, and text highlights.
usage_rules.gradients: Avoid generic linear gradients. Use radial gradients of Saffron/Gold with 0-20% opacity on Charcoal backgrounds to create 'Glow' spots.

layout_strategy.spacing_system: Generous. Use p-6, p-8, p-12. Avoid cramped layouts.

grid_system.bento_grid: Use for Menu and Features. Mix 1x1, 2x1, and 2x2 cells. Asymmetrical layouts preferred.
grid_system.mobile_first: Single column on mobile, expanding to 12-col grid on desktop (if web target).

containers.cards: No flat cards. Use 'Tracing Beam' borders or 'Smoked Glass' backgrounds.
containers.sections: Full-screen hero sections with parallax scrolling.

textures.noise: Overlay a subtle 5% noise texture on the Charcoal background to prevent banding and add grit.
textures.patterns: Use low-opacity Indian geometric patterns (Rangoli/Mandala) in the negative space.

borders.gold_trim: 1px solid #D4AF37 with 30% opacity for card borders.
borders.tracing_beam: Animated gradient borders for high-value plans.

buttons.primary: bg-deep_saffron text-charcoal font-bold rounded-full hover:shadow-glow transition-all
buttons.secondary: border border-brushed_gold text-brushed_gold bg-transparent rounded-full hover:bg-brushed_gold/10

inputs.style: bg-charcoal_light border-white/20 text-off_white focus:border-deep_saffron rounded-lg p-4

navigation.style: Floating glass bar at the bottom (mobile) or top (desktop). Backdrop blur required.

media.image_style: Cinematic, High Contrast, Warm Lighting. Food should look steaming hot. Spices should look textured.

implementation: Model: Stacked Stainless Steel Tiffin. Each layer customizable (Curry, Rice, Bread, Dessert).
Materials: StandardMaterial with high 'metalness' (0.8) and 'roughness' (0.2) for the tiffin. Realistic food textures for contents.
three_d_strategy.fallback: If 3D fails or on low-end devices, fallback to high-res PNG sequence of the tiffin.

universal_guidelines: INSTALL NativeWind (v4) for Tailwind styling in Expo.
DO NOT use generic AI emojis.
Ensure 100% Dark Mode compliance. No white backgrounds.
Accessibility: Ensure Gold text on Charcoal meets 4.5:1 contrast (adjust shade if needed).
Animation: Use React Native Reanimated for smooth transitions (entering screens, button presses).

instructions_to_main_agent.step_1: Install NativeWind and Tailwind CSS. Create tailwind.config.js.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_2: Set up the font system with Expo Font (Playfair Display, Manrope).
instructions_to_main_agent.step_4: Implement the 3D Tiffin Customizer using React Three Fiber.
